sections.instruction: Questions 1-3: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 4-10: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: How many bottles of wine do you have to buy to get one free?
Which type of wine do David’s friends prefer?
What is the price of the champagne?

sections.instruction: Questions 11 and 12: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 13-20: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: How did the players hit the ball when the game first launched in the 12th century?
In the 16th century what kind of people found tennis most appealing?

sections.instruction: Questions 21-27: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 28-30: Choose THREE letters A-G.

questions.content: What THREE rules given to them by the headmaster do the students have to follow during the conference? (28) {{BLANK}} (29) {{BLANK}} (30) {{BLANK}}
options: A make sure they tidy up the hall and rooms after the conference
B provide cleaners for the conference
C provide lunch for the speakers
D make a record of what each student at the conference wants to study at University
E make a record of what each student at the conference is studying now
F make a record of all the students who attend the conference
G help organize the travel arrangements for the speakers

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.
sections.passage_or_context:
